channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Would you hire the lawyer who just got sanctioned for using AI?
item.description: Fabricated citations, invented quotes, and waived privileges. Lawyers are misusing AI, and clients are paying the price.

item.title: AI's cyborg problem: you have to embrace it to really succeed but 90% of people can't or don't want to
item.description: Vivienne Ming warns of a 'cognitive divide,' telling Fortune that 'most of our fears about AI are fears about other people.'

item.title: Gen Z wants AI-proof jobs. The president of a 50-property hotel chain says hospitality is hiding in plain sight
item.description: Kurt Alexander, president of Omni Hotels, says hospitality offers AI-resistant careers for young workers with the right attitude.

item.title: The prophet of the 'Wired Belt' says capitalism is finally eating itself
item.description: Tufts' Bhaskar Chakravorti predicted AI would destroy the jobs business needs most — in the exact cities where business lives.
